_comment: The same agent after three changes. Nothing was rewritten, no model was swapped, no framework was adopted. The shell tool is gone, the one remaining state change is gated, and the credentials moved off disk into a per-call scoped issuer.

tools.name: get_service_status
tools.description: Read current status of a service.

tools.name: list_deployments
tools.description: List recent deployments for a service.

tools.name: read_logs
tools.description: Fetch the last N lines of a service log.

tools.name: redeploy_service
tools.description: Trigger a redeploy of an existing service. Requires explicit human approval before it lands.

tools.name: set_env_var
tools.description: Update an environment variable on a service. Requires explicit human approval. Previous value is versioned and restorable.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the working tree.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search the working tree for a pattern.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write a file in the working tree. Versioned, every write is restorable from git.

tools.name: send_slack_message
tools.description: Post a message to the team channel. Requires human approval outside the team channel.
